material_findings: Skoola_NET20241122 is a 227800 KB private application on nonstandard default branch mostafa; branch inventory must not assume main/master and migration requires security/data review.
UI-TARS-desktop is a 191768 KB public desktop-control agent repository; upstream provenance, model assets, desktop permissions and license obligations require dedicated review.

ERPV1137-2025-08-06 and SASERP811V2020withidentity expand the ERP product/version landscape and must be compared with the owner-confirmed BackEndNet5 ERP backend before any canonical or migration decision.
CPDEventPlanner gained two more filename-signaled versions; final and v2 labels remain weak evidence and cannot select a canonical repository.
